input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.8.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.8.2.2
            TITLE: all threaded critical fasteners must be one of the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.8.2.2: All threaded Critical Fasteners must be one of the following:
T.8.2.2 All threaded Critical Fasteners must be one of the following: 
• Hex head  
• Hexagonal recessed drive (Socket Head Cap Screws or Allen screws/bolts)

final_answer: All threaded Critical Fasteners must be one of the following: • Hex head • Hexagonal recessed drive (Socket Head Cap Screws or Allen screws/bolts)
